## Checklist

- [ ] Task checkbox updated in docs/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
- [ ] No deviation from SPEC.md locked decisions (or the deviation is explained below)
- [ ] New/changed logic is covered by GUT tests where it is pure logic
- [ ] Minigame PRs only: tested at 2, 4, and 6 players + one disconnect/rejoin + keyboard and gamepad
- [ ] Any new assets are CC0/CC-BY and recorded in assets/CREDITS.md

### Coordination (docs/AGENT_COORDINATION.md)

- [ ] Only files owned by this task (§3) or hotspot files declared in the claim issue (§4) are touched
- [ ] Branch contains current `origin/main` (`git merge-base --is-ancestor origin/main HEAD`) — re-checked at merge time, rebase if anyone merged first
- [ ] Not stacked on another feature branch (or the stacking is declared at the top and the §5 stacked-PR merge steps will be followed)
